name: insightsignal
description: Query your verified knowledge graph — companies, people, research reports, and business relationships — all multi-source verified with confidence scores.
long_description:
InsightSignal connects Claude to your private, multi-source verified knowledge graph. Every data point is checked by 2+ independent sources with confidence scores, citation URLs, and temporal provenance tracking.

**KEY CAPABILITIES**
- **Search & Filter**: Find verified companies and people in your private data with grades (A-F), confidence scores, and operational status
- **Contact Intelligence**: Access email, phone, LinkedIn with deliverability scores and BDR-focused readiness grades
- **Research Reports**: Read multi-source research with verdicts, evidence links, and competitive analysis
- **Knowledge Graph**: Explore business relationships — subsidiaries, competitors, partners, key people
- **Compare & Analyze**: Side-by-side company comparison on key metrics, portfolio-level statistics
- **Temporal Tracking**: See how verified data changed over time across snapshots
- **Intent Scoring**: View intent-based relevance scores for sales prospecting, competitor analysis, and more

**TRUST & QUALITY**
- Multi-source verified: Each field checked by 2+ independent sources
- Confidence-scored: Numeric 0-1 confidence based on source agreement, freshness, and authority
- Citation-backed: Every field links to the evidence page where it was verified
- User knowledge overrides: Your private intel always takes highest priority

**NETWORK ONLY** — This extension only makes API calls to your InsightSignal server. It does not access your filesystem, run shell commands, or modify anything on your computer.

api_key.title: API Key
api_key.description: Your InsightSignal API key (starts with is_). Create one in Profile → API Keys.

tools.name: search_companies
tools.description: Search and filter verified companies by name, industry, location, grade, operational status, or disposition. Supports pagination.

tools.name: search_people
tools.description: Search verified contacts by name, title, company, email, or phone. Filter by readiness grade, email deliverability, or phone validity.

tools.name: entity_get_company
tools.description: Get full company profile — grade, confidence scores, operational status, verification sources, field-level provenance, and all metadata.

tools.name: entity_get_person
tools.description: Get person detail — name, title, email with deliverability, phone with validation, LinkedIn, readiness grade, and enrichment history.

tools.name: entity_get_company_people
tools.description: List all verified contacts at a specific company with their roles, contact info, and readiness scores.

tools.name: entity_get_company_research
tools.description: Get multi-source research report — ActionHero verdict, evidence-backed sections, competitive signals, and fact extraction.

tools.name: compare_companies
tools.description: Side-by-side comparison of two companies on grades, industry, size, revenue, confidence, and key metrics.

tools.name: get_graph_relationships
tools.description: Explore knowledge graph — subsidiaries, parent companies, competitors, partners, and key personnel relationships.

tools.name: get_portfolio_stats
tools.description: Portfolio-level analytics — grade distribution, industry breakdown, average quality and completeness, disposition counts.

tools.name: get_intent_summary
tools.description: View intent-based scoring context — categories like target, competitor, or excluded, alignment scores, and intent profile criteria.

tools.name: count_companies
tools.description: Count companies matching filters — by grade, industry, status, or disposition. Quick portfolio sizing.

tools.name: get_discovered_entities
tools.description: List entities discovered through research and verification — potential competitors, partners, and related companies.

tools.name: get_recent_activity
tools.description: Recent verification runs, research reports, and enrichment activity across the user's knowledge graph.

tools.name: temporal_get_snapshots
tools.description: View historical verification snapshots for a company — see how data changed over time with full field-level audit trail.
